spells.name: Lumos
spells.effect_sr: Stvara svetlost na vrhu čarobnog štapa.
spells.effect_en: Creates a light at the tip of the wand.
spells.origin_sr: Klasična čarolija za osvetljavanje, koristi se od osnivanja Hogvortsa.
spells.origin_en: Classic illumination charm, used since the founding of Hogwarts.

spells.name: Nox
spells.effect_sr: Gasi svetlost stvorenu čarolijom Lumos.
spells.effect_en: Extinguishes the light created by Lumos.
spells.origin_sr: Prirodni par sa Lumosom  često se uče zajedno na prvoj godini.
spells.origin_en: Natural counterpart to Lumos  usually taught together in first year.

spells.name: Alohomora
spells.effect_sr: Otključava vrata i bravice koje nisu zaštićene jačim čarolijama.
spells.effect_en: Unlocks doors and latches not protected by stronger charms.
spells.origin_sr: Reč potiče iz zapadnoafričkog dijalekta  "prijateljski naklonjeno lopovima".
spells.origin_en: Word originates from a West African dialect meaning "friendly to thieves".

spells.name: Expelliarmus
spells.effect_sr: Razoružava protivnika izbacujući mu štap iz ruke.
spells.effect_en: Disarms an opponent, sending their wand flying from their hand.
spells.origin_sr: Potpis Harija Potera  koristio ga je toliko često da je postao njegova zaštitna čarolija.
spells.origin_en: Harry Potter's signature spell  he used it so often it became his trademark.

spells.name: Stupefy
spells.effect_sr: Onesvešćuje protivnika crvenim mlazom svetla.
spells.effect_en: Knocks an opponent unconscious with a jet of red light.
spells.origin_sr: Standardna čarolija aurora  najčešća za bezbedno hvatanje sumnjivaca.
spells.origin_en: Standard Auror spell  the most common way to safely apprehend a suspect.

spells.name: Protego
spells.effect_sr: Stvara magični štit koji reflektuje uroke nazad ka napadaču.
spells.effect_en: Creates a magical shield that reflects spells back at the attacker.
spells.origin_sr: Latinski za "štititi"  temelj svake odbrambene magije.
spells.origin_en: Latin for "I protect"  the foundation of all defensive magic.

spells.name: Expecto Patronum
spells.effect_sr: Prizivanje Patronusa  duhovnog zaštitnika protiv Dementora.
spells.effect_en: Conjures a Patronus  a spirit guardian against Dementors.
spells.origin_sr: Jedna od najtežih čarolija; zahteva snažnu sretnu uspomenu.
spells.origin_en: One of the most difficult spells; requires a powerful happy memory.

spells.name: Wingardium Leviosa
spells.effect_sr: Podiže predmete u zrak i pomera ih voljom čarobnjaka.
spells.effect_en: Lifts objects into the air and moves them at the caster's will.
spells.origin_sr: Prva čarolija koju Hermiona pravilno izgovori ("Levi-O-sa, ne Levi-o-SAA").
spells.origin_en: The first spell Hermione pronounced correctly ("Levi-O-sa, not Levi-o-SAA").

spells.name: Accio
spells.effect_sr: Doziva predmet iz daljine pravo u ruku čarobnjaka.
spells.effect_en: Summons an object from a distance directly into the caster's hand.
spells.origin_sr: Hari ga koristi u Trotomnom Turniru da dozove svoju metlu.
spells.origin_en: Harry uses it in the Triwizard Tournament to summon his broomstick.

spells.name: Reparo
spells.effect_sr: Popravlja slomljene predmete vraćajući ih u prvobitno stanje.
spells.effect_en: Repairs broken objects, restoring them to their original state.
spells.origin_sr: Hermiona ga koristi za Harijeve naočare na samom početku.
spells.origin_en: Hermione uses it for Harry's glasses at the very start.

spells.name: Obliviate
spells.effect_sr: Briše određena sećanja iz uma cilja.
spells.effect_en: Erases specific memories from the target's mind.
spells.origin_sr: Lockhart pokušava da je upotrebi na Ronu i Hariju  i zaboravlja sam sebe.
spells.origin_en: Lockhart tries to use it on Ron and Harry  and ends up wiping his own memory.

spells.name: Imperio
spells.effect_sr: Imperius kletva  daje potpunu kontrolu nad voljom žrtve.
spells.effect_en: The Imperius Curse  grants total control over the victim's will.
spells.origin_sr: Jedna od tri Nepraštajuće kletve. Upotreba znači doživotni zatvor u Azkabanu.
spells.origin_en: One of three Unforgivable Curses. Use means life imprisonment in Azkaban.

spells.name: Crucio
spells.effect_sr: Cruciatus kletva  nanosi neizdrživ bol bez fizičkih povreda.
spells.effect_en: The Cruciatus Curse  inflicts unbearable pain without physical wounds.
spells.origin_sr: Belatriks Lestrejndž je majstor ove kletve; koristi je za mučenje Longbotomovih.
spells.origin_en: Bellatrix Lestrange is a master of this curse; she used it to torture the Longbottoms.

spells.name: Avada Kedavra
spells.effect_sr: Smrtonosna kletva  trenutna i nepovratna smrt. Zeleni mlaz svetla.
spells.effect_en: The Killing Curse  instant and irreversible death. Green flash of light.
spells.origin_sr: Najmračnija od Nepraštajućih. Hari je jedini poznati preživeli.
spells.origin_en: Darkest of the Unforgivables. Harry is the only known survivor.

spells.name: Sectumsempra
spells.effect_sr: Stvara duboke posekotine kao od nevidljivog mača.
spells.effect_en: Creates deep slashes as if from an invisible sword.
spells.origin_sr: Izumio Severus Snejp dok je još bio student  "za neprijatelje".
spells.origin_en: Invented by Severus Snape as a student  labeled "for enemies".

spells.name: Riddikulus
spells.effect_sr: Pretvara Bogarta u nešto smešno  strah se pobeđuje smehom.
spells.effect_en: Turns a Boggart into something funny  fear is defeated by laughter.
spells.origin_sr: Profesor Lupin uči treću godinu Hogvortsa ovoj čaroliji.
spells.origin_en: Professor Lupin teaches this spell to third-year Hogwarts students.

spells.name: Petrificus Totalus
spells.effect_sr: Potpuno telesno vezivanje  žrtva ostaje uspravna ali nepomična.
spells.effect_en: Full Body-Bind  victim remains upright but completely immobile.
spells.origin_sr: Hermiona je iskoristila na Nevilu da ga spreči da im stane na put.
spells.origin_en: Hermione used it on Neville to stop him from blocking their way.

spells.name: Incendio
spells.effect_sr: Stvara plamen  koristi se za potpaljivanje vatre.
spells.effect_en: Conjures fire  used to light flames.
spells.origin_sr: Standardna čarolija za korišćenje Letećeg praha u kaminu.
spells.origin_en: Standard charm for lighting a Floo Powder fire.

spells.name: Aguamenti
spells.effect_sr: Iz vrha štapa izbija mlaz čiste vode.
spells.effect_en: A jet of clear water shoots from the wand tip.
spells.origin_sr: Od latinskog "aqua"  voda. Korisna i u svakodnevici.
spells.origin_en: From Latin "aqua"  water. Useful in everyday life too.

spells.name: Episkey
spells.effect_sr: Leči manje povrede  slomljen nos, posekotine.
spells.effect_en: Heals minor injuries  broken nose, small cuts.
spells.origin_sr: Tonks koristi na Hariju nakon što mu Malfoj polomi nos.
spells.origin_en: Tonks uses it on Harry after Malfoy breaks his nose.

spells.name: Finite Incantatem
spells.effect_sr: Poništava efekte drugih čarolija u prostoriji.
spells.effect_en: Cancels the effects of other active spells in the area.
spells.origin_sr: Glavna "reset" čarolija  uči se u Klubu za odbranu.
spells.origin_en: The main "reset" spell  taught in the Defense Club.

spells.name: Morsmordre
spells.effect_sr: Prizivanje Mračnog Znaka  zeleno mrtvačko obličje sa zmijom na nebu.
spells.effect_en: Conjures the Dark Mark  a green skull with a serpent in the sky.
spells.origin_sr: Znak Voldemora i njegovih Smrtoždera; izaziva paniku gde god se pojavi.
spells.origin_en: Voldemort's mark and that of his Death Eaters; causes panic wherever it appears.

spells.name: Revelio
spells.effect_sr: Otkriva skrivene tragove, mastila i prikrivene predmete.
spells.effect_en: Reveals hidden writing, invisible ink and concealed objects.
spells.origin_sr: Hermiona pokušava da je upotrebi na Razlomljenom Princu.
spells.origin_en: Hermione tries to use it on the Half-Blood Prince's textbook.

spells.name: Confundo
spells.effect_sr: Zbunjuje cilj, čineći ga nesigurnim u svoje postupke.
spells.effect_en: Confuses the target, making them unsure of their actions.
spells.origin_sr: Hermiona ga koristi na ispitivaču na ispitu za apariciju.
spells.origin_en: Hermione uses it on the examiner during the Apparition test.

spells.name: Engorgio
spells.effect_sr: Povećava veličinu predmeta nekoliko puta.
spells.effect_en: Increases the size of an object several times over.
spells.origin_sr: Hagrid ga često koristi na svojim bundevama.
spells.origin_en: Hagrid often uses it on his pumpkins.

spells.name: Reducio
spells.effect_sr: Suprotno od Engorgio  vraća predmet u normalnu veličinu.
spells.effect_en: Opposite of Engorgio  restores an object to normal size.
spells.origin_sr: Učeno zajedno sa Engorgiom kao osnovne čarolije transformacije.
spells.origin_en: Taught alongside Engorgio as a basic transformation charm.

spells.name: Geminio
spells.effect_sr: Duplira predmet  kopija izgleda identično ali je bezvredna.
spells.effect_en: Duplicates an object  the copy looks identical but is worthless.
spells.origin_sr: Belatriks ga koristi u trezoru Gringotsa da zaštiti pehar Hafl-Pafa.
spells.origin_en: Bellatrix uses it in the Gringotts vault to protect Hufflepuff's cup.

spells.name: Silencio
spells.effect_sr: Cilj ne može da proizvede nikakav zvuk  uključujući izgovaranje čarolija.
spells.effect_en: The target cannot produce any sound  including spell incantations.
spells.origin_sr: Naročito korisna protiv čarobnjaka koji zavise od verbalnih čarolija.
spells.origin_en: Especially useful against wizards who rely on verbal spells.

spells.name: Muffliato
spells.effect_sr: Ispunjava uši okoline tihim zujanjem  privatni razgovori postaju mogući.
spells.effect_en: Fills nearby ears with a soft buzzing  private conversations become possible.
spells.origin_sr: Izumio Snejp; Hermiona ju je našla u Knjizi Razlomljenog Princa.
spells.origin_en: Invented by Snape; Hermione found it in the Half-Blood Prince's book.

spells.name: Fidelius
spells.effect_sr: Skriva tajnu unutar duše Čuvara Tajne  niko drugi je ne može otkriti.
spells.effect_en: Hides a secret inside a Secret-Keeper's soul  no one else can reveal it.
spells.origin_sr: Štitila je Poterove u Godrikovoj Kotlini sve dok Petigru nije izdao.
spells.origin_en: Protected the Potters at Godric's Hollow until Pettigrew betrayed them.
